title: Normal-incidence dielectric slab Fresnel workflow
description: Create, validate, run, and inspect normal-incidence reflection and transmission against the exact transfer-matrix solution.

expected_metrics.observable: mean absolute deviation of R(f)+T(f) from unity

ui_journey.acceptance: Create a new immutable Fresnel experiment revision from the golden input.
Change slab thickness or permittivity through typed fields and show a semantic diff.
Show slab layers, source region, and observation planes without a solve.
Show resolution, source, boundary, and lossless-energy diagnostics.
Approve and launch a CPU worker linked to the immutable revision.
Overlay R/T against the exact reference and show energy closure plus field space-time availability.
Export a checksum-verified bundle containing spec, code, events, metrics, and limitations.

limitations: P0 covers isotropic, lossless, normal-incidence stratified media only.
Oblique incidence, anisotropy, and dispersive loss require separate support lanes and evidence.
The public baseline was produced on GPU; the local CPU profile must satisfy the same declared metric tolerances before promotion.
